framework_name: FFIEC IT Examination Handbook — Information Security booklet

controls.title: Board-Approved Information Security Program
controls.description: A documented, board-approved information security program covers the institution's IT risk profile + customer-information protection obligations under GLBA + state privacy laws.

controls.title: CISO / ISO Designation + Authority
controls.description: A designated Chief Information Security Officer (or equivalent) has documented authority + reporting line appropriate for the institution's complexity.

controls.title: Annual Board Reporting
controls.description: The board (or designated committee) receives at-least-annual information-security program status reports covering risk, incidents, + program effectiveness.

controls.title: Information Security Policies + Standards
controls.description: Documented IS policies + supporting technical standards cover the institution's IS control environment + are reviewed at least annually.

controls.title: Information Asset Inventory
controls.description: An information asset inventory documents systems + data stores, with classification by sensitivity + criticality.

controls.title: Threat + Vulnerability Identification
controls.description: Documented processes identify threats (insider, external, environmental) + vulnerabilities (technical + procedural) applicable to the institution's environment.

controls.title: Risk Assessment Methodology
controls.description: A documented risk-assessment methodology produces qualitative or quantitative risk ratings used to prioritize control investments.

controls.title: Periodic Risk Reassessment
controls.description: Risk assessments are refreshed on a documented cadence (typically annual) + after material environment changes.

controls.title: Access Provisioning + Deprovisioning
controls.description: User access is provisioned via documented approval workflow + deprovisioned promptly upon role change or termination.

controls.title: Least-Privilege + Need-to-Know
controls.description: Access rights follow least-privilege + need-to-know principles; deviations are exception-tracked.

controls.title: Privileged Access Management
controls.description: Privileged accounts are inventoried, time-limited where feasible, monitored, + subject to enhanced authentication requirements.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: Multi-factor authentication is required for: customer-facing remote access, internal privileged access, + administrative access to sensitive systems.

controls.title: Periodic Access Recertification
controls.description: User + privileged access is recertified on a documented cadence (typically annual for general; more frequent for privileged) by appropriate management.

controls.title: Segregation of Duties
controls.description: Critical processes (payment authorization, change deployment, log review) are split across roles to prevent single-actor compromise.

controls.title: Data Classification
controls.description: Data is classified by sensitivity using a documented schema; classification drives handling + retention requirements.

controls.title: Encryption at Rest
controls.description: Sensitive data is encrypted at rest using documented + industry-accepted algorithms + key-management practices.

controls.title: Encryption in Transit
controls.description: Sensitive data is encrypted in transit; deprecated protocols (SSLv2/v3, TLS 1.0/1.1) are documented as deprecated + phased out.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Management
controls.description: Cryptographic keys are managed under a documented key-management lifecycle (generation, distribution, storage, rotation, retirement).

controls.title: Data Loss Prevention
controls.description: Documented DLP controls (technical + procedural) prevent + detect unauthorized exfiltration of sensitive data.

controls.title: Secure Disposal
controls.description: Documented secure-disposal procedures cover end-of-life IT assets + storage media to prevent residual-data exposure.

controls.title: Network Segmentation
controls.description: Network is segmented by trust zone (public, DMZ, internal, PCI, OT) with documented inter-zone traffic-control rules.

controls.title: Firewall + Boundary Protection
controls.description: Firewalls + network access controls enforce the documented segmentation model with periodic rule-base reviews.

controls.title: Intrusion Detection + Prevention
controls.description: Network IDS / IPS + endpoint detection are deployed on appropriate boundaries + monitored + tuned on a documented cadence.

controls.title: Wireless Network Security
controls.description: Wireless networks use strong authentication + encryption; guest networks are segregated from production environments.

controls.title: Remote Access Security
controls.description: Remote access uses MFA + encrypted tunnels; remote-access session recording / monitoring is in place for privileged use.

controls.title: Vulnerability Scanning
controls.description: Production environments receive periodic vulnerability scans (typically monthly internal + quarterly external) with documented remediation SLAs.

controls.title: Patch Management Process
controls.description: Documented patch management process covers identification, risk-assessed prioritization, testing, + deployment with severity-driven SLAs.

controls.title: Penetration Testing
controls.description: Independent penetration testing is performed periodically (typically annual) covering external + internal attack surfaces; findings are remediated.

controls.title: Centralized Logging
controls.description: Security-relevant events from network, system, + application layers are aggregated to a central logging platform.

controls.title: Log Retention
controls.description: Logs are retained per documented schedule meeting regulatory + investigative requirements (typically 1 year online; longer for regulated data).

controls.title: SIEM + Correlation
controls.description: Security events are correlated via SIEM (or equivalent) + monitored 24x7 in-house or via MSSP, with documented escalation.

controls.title: Privileged Activity Monitoring
controls.description: Privileged-user actions are logged in tamper-resistant form + reviewed on a documented cadence by independent reviewers.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: A documented incident response plan covers detection, containment, eradication, recovery, + post-incident review.

controls.title: Incident Response Team + Authority
controls.description: An incident response team has documented authority, escalation paths, + cross-functional representation (IT, IS, legal, compliance, communications).

controls.title: Incident Response Testing
controls.description: Incident response capabilities are exercised through periodic tabletop or live-fire scenarios with documented improvement actions.

controls.title: Customer-Notification Procedures
controls.description: Documented procedures cover customer notification under applicable laws (state breach laws, GLBA Interagency Guidance) including content + timing requirements.

controls.title: Regulatory Notification
controls.description: Documented procedures cover regulatory incident notification per primary regulator's requirements (e.g., 36-hour rule under FFIEC Interagency Computer-Security Incident Notification).

controls.title: Vendor Information-Security Due Diligence
controls.description: Third-party security posture is evaluated via documented due-diligence process before contract + on ongoing basis.

controls.title: Cloud Service Provider Security
controls.description: Cloud provider security posture is evaluated via SOC reports, industry attestations, + provider-specific configuration reviews.

controls.title: Vendor + Cloud Concentration Risk
controls.description: Concentration of critical functions with single vendors / providers is assessed + mitigated where appropriate.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: All workforce members receive at-least-annual security awareness training covering current threat landscape.

controls.title: Phishing Resistance Program
controls.description: Documented phishing simulation + training program; click-rate trends are tracked + addressed via targeted training.

controls.title: Insider-Threat Program
controls.description: Documented insider-threat program addresses unusual privileged-user activity, departing-employee risk, + role-based monitoring.
